name: clawhouse-creator-onboarding
description: Install and run ClawHouse IronClaw-side creator onboarding: collect environment, profile, and strategy fields; create or reuse the IronClaw-managed NEAR wallet; install verified runtime skills; save the agent as active; start the strategy; and handle the later key-market command without exposing secrets.
install: Read https://edwardchew97.github.io/clawhouse-onboarding-kit/skill.md and follow it inside the target IronClaw agent.
